zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton於1425年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，她的父親Sir John de Throckmorton43歲，母親Lady Alianore de la Spine40歲。她於1445年4月20日與Sir Richard Middleton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1496年11月6日在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年71歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton于1425年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，她的父亲Sir John de Throckmorton43岁，母亲Lady Alianore de la Spine40岁。她于1445年4月20日与Sir Richard Middleton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1496年11月6日在英国諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年71岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton was born in 1425, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir John de Throckmorton, was 43 and her mother, Lady Alianore de la Spine, was 40. She married Sir Richard Middleton on 20 April 1445, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 6 November 1496, in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton est née en 1425, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Throckmorton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Alianore de la Spine, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Middleton le 20 avril 1445, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 novembre 1496, à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Towcester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton 1425 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Throckmorton 43 und ihre Mutter Lady Alianore de la Spine 40. Sie hat am 20. April 1445 in England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Middleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. November 1496 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton è nata il nel 1425 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Throckmorton, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Lady Alianore de la Spine, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Middleton il 20 aprile 1445, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1496, nel Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Towcester, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughtonが1425年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Throckmortonは43歳，母Lady Alianore de la Spineは40歳であった。1445年4月20日にイギリスイギリスでSir Richard Middletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1496年11月6日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーで71歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton(이)가 1425년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Throckmorton(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alianore de la Spine(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1445년 4월 20일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Richard Middleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1496년 11월 6일 영국 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton nasceu em 1425, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Throckmorton, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alianore de la Spine, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Middleton em 20 de abril de 1445, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1496, em Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton родилась в 1425 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Throckmorton было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alianore de la Spine, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Middleton 20 апреля 1445 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 ноября 1496 г. в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Matilda Throckmorton of Coughton nació en 1425, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Throckmorton, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lady Alianore de la Spine, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Middleton el 20 de abril de 1445, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1496, en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
